# 🛒 AI-Powered Retail Sales Analytics Platform

> An end-to-end Data Science project that transforms raw retail transaction data into actionable business insights using Machine Learning, Time Series Forecasting, Customer Segmentation, and Recommendation Systems.

![Python](https://img.shields.io/badge/Python-3.11-blue?logo=python)
![Pandas](https://img.shields.io/badge/Pandas-Data%20Analysis-green)
![Scikit-Learn](https://img.shields.io/badge/Scikit--Learn-ML-orange)
![XGBoost](https://img.shields.io/badge/XGBoost-Gradient%20Boosting-red)
![LightGBM](https://img.shields.io/badge/LightGBM-ML-yellowgreen)
![Prophet](https://img.shields.io/badge/Prophet-Time%20Series-purple)
![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-blue)

---

# 📌 Project Overview

This project demonstrates a complete **Retail Sales Analytics Pipeline** covering the entire data science workflow.

The project includes:

- Data Loading
- Data Cleaning
- Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA)
- Feature Engineering
- Machine Learning Model Building
- Model Evaluation
- Sales Forecasting
- Customer Segmentation
- Product Recommendation System
- Automated Business Report Generation

This project is designed as an **industry-level portfolio project** for **Data Analyst**, **Business Analyst**, and **Data Scientist** roles.

---

# 🚀 Features

✅ Sales Analytics Dashboard

✅ Profit Analysis

✅ Customer Behaviour Analysis

✅ Product Performance Analysis

✅ Feature Engineering

✅ Machine Learning Models

- Linear Regression
- Random Forest
- XGBoost
- LightGBM

✅ Sales Forecasting

- Facebook Prophet
- Holt-Winters Forecasting

✅ Customer Segmentation

- RFM Analysis
- K-Means Clustering

✅ Recommendation Engine

- Item-Based Collaborative Filtering
- Cosine Similarity

✅ Automated PDF Business Report

---

# 📂 Project Structure

```
Retail-Sales-Analytics/
│
├── data/
│   ├── raw/
│   └── processed/
│
├── notebooks/
│   ├── 01_Data_Loading.ipynb
│   ├── 02_Data_Cleaning.ipynb
│   ├── 03_EDA.ipynb
│   ├── 04_Feature_Engineering.ipynb
│   ├── 05_Model_Building.ipynb
│   ├── 06_Model_Evaluation.ipynb
│   ├── 07_Sales_Forecasting.ipynb
│   ├── 08_Customer_Segmentation.ipynb
│   ├── 09_Recommendations.ipynb
│   └── 10_Final_Report.ipynb
│
├── images/
├── reports/
├── models/
│
├── README.md
├── requirements.txt
└── LICENSE
```

---

# 📊 Machine Learning Models

| Model | Purpose |
|--------|----------|
| Linear Regression | Baseline Regression |
| Random Forest | Ensemble Learning |
| XGBoost | Gradient Boosting |
| LightGBM | High Performance Boosting |

Evaluation Metrics

- MAE
- RMSE
- R² Score

---

# 📈 Forecasting

Time Series Forecasting using

- Facebook Prophet
- Holt-Winters Exponential Smoothing

Forecast Output

- Next 90 Days Sales Forecast
- Trend Analysis
- Seasonality Analysis

---

# 👥 Customer Segmentation

Technique Used

- RFM Analysis
- StandardScaler
- PCA
- K-Means Clustering

Output

- Customer Segments
- Segment Visualization

---

# 🎯 Recommendation Engine

Algorithm

- Item-Based Collaborative Filtering

Similarity Measure

- Cosine Similarity

Output

- Product Recommendations
- Customer Recommendations

---

# 📑 Generated Reports

The project automatically generates

- KPI Dashboard
- Forecast Reports
- Customer Segmentation Report
- Machine Learning Evaluation Report
- Final Business PDF Report

Location

```
reports/
```

Programming

- Python

Libraries

- Pandas
- NumPy
- Matplotlib
- Seaborn
- Plotly

- XGBoost
- LightGBM

Tools

---

# ⚙ Installation

Clone the repository

```bash
git clone https://github.com/yourusername/Retail-Sales-Analytics.git
```

Move into the project

```bash
cd Retail-Sales-Analytics
```

Install dependencies

```bash
pip install -r requirements.txt
```

---

# ▶️ How to Run

Run notebooks in the following order:

1. 01_Data_Loading.ipynb
2. 02_Data_Cleaning.ipynb
3. 03_EDA.ipynb
4. 04_Feature_Engineering.ipynb
5. 05_Model_Building.ipynb
6. 06_Model_Evaluation.ipynb
7. 07_Sales_Forecasting.ipynb
8. 08_Customer_Segmentation.ipynb
9. 09_Recommendations.ipynb
10. 10_Final_Report.ipynb

---

```
reports/
images/
models/
processed datasets/
```
